description: Multi-ecosystem heavy test. 3 lamps + 3 sensors + 3 plugs. Count=3 per requirement creates significantly larger search space (combinations_with_replacement(N, 3) vs (N, 2)). Brute force may take several minutes; set run_brute_force=false if you only want heuristic. With run_brute_force=true, use this to stress-test correctness under longer runtimes and verify the heuristic front is competitive.
